popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/NORMANDY.htm#Adelaisdied1081 as of 4/3/2016

HERLEVE [Arlette], daughter of FULBERT [de Falaise] & his wife Doda [Duwa] ---.  Guillaume of Jumièges names “He …

christeningPlace.address: Falaise - Dtr of Fulbert the Tanner

burialPlace.address: Abbey of Grestrain, Fatouville-Gristain, Departement de L'Eure, Haute-Normandie, France

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Herleva or Arlette was the mother of William the Conqueror. According to later legend, she was a young woman in the town of Falaise who attracted the attention of Duke Robert of Normandy when she was washing in the river near his castle, and he took her for his mistress. She was daughter of Fulbert, of whom little is known. Much later, when her son William the Conqueror, was besieging a town, the defenders are said to have taunted him by hanging animal skins from the walls in reference to his maternal grandfather. The obscure word used to describe the man has traditionally been interpreted as 'tanner', but several decades ago a historian suggested it may instead have referred to Fulbert having been a ducal chamberlain, among whose roles was the preparation of corpses.

By Robert, Herleva had a son, William in 1027 or 1028. Robert's other child, a daughter Adelaide, is said by chronicler Rodert de Torigny to have been born "de alia concubina" (to another mistress), so she was not Herleva's daughter.  Herleva married Herluin de Conteville in 1029. From this marriage she had two sons: Odo and Robert, who both became prominent during William's reign. They also had at least one daughter, who married William, lord of La Fert-Mac, though later genealogists would assign them many additional daughters in order to link other families to the English royal house.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Herleva de Falaise於1003年6月9日出生在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯法拉時，她的父親Fulbert de Falaise27歲，母親Doda23歲。她於大約1029年與Herluin de Conteville結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1050年4月23日在法國豪-諾門迪艾卡貝-格雷斯當享年46歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪艾法圖維爾-格雷斯當。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

en.lifeSummary: When Herleva de Falaise was born on 9 June 1003, in Falaise, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, her father, Fulbert de Falaise, was 27 and her mother, Doda, was 23. She married Herluin de Conteville about 1029. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 23 April 1050, in Carbec-Grestain, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 46, and was buried in Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Herleva de Falaise est née le 9 juin 1003, à Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Fulbert de Falaise, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Doda, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Herluin de Conteville environ 1029. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 avril 1050, à Carbec-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Herleva de Falaise am 9. Juni 1003 in Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Fulbert de Falaise 27 und ihre Mutter Doda 23. Sie hat um 1029 Herluin de Conteville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. April 1050 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Carbec-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Herleva de Falaise è nata il il 9 giugno 1003 nel Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Fulbert de Falaise, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Doda, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Herluin de Conteville circa 1029. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 aprile 1050, nel Carbec-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Herleva de Falaiseが1003年6月9日にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスファレイゼで生まれた時，父Fulbert de Falaiseは27歳，母Dodaは23歳であった。約1029年にHerluin de Contevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1050年4月23日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアカーベク-グレスティインで46歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアファトウヴィレ-グレスティインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Herleva de Falaise(이)가 1003년 6월 9일 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 팔레이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Fulbert de Falaise(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Doda(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1029년 Herluin de Conteville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1050년 4월 23일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 카베c-그레스테인에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 팻우비레-그레스테인에 묻혔다.

mn.9 June 1003–23 April 1050: 1003 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 9–1050 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 23

pt.9 June 1003–23 April 1050: 9 de junho de 1003–23 de abril de 1050
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Herleva de Falaise nasceu em 9 de junho de 1003, em Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Fulbert de Falaise, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Doda, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Herluin de Conteville aproximadamente 1029. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de abril de 1050, em Carbec-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Herleva de Falaise родилась 9 июня 1003 г. в местности фалеис, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Fulbert de Falaise было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Doda, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Herluin de Conteville около 1029 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 23 апреля 1050 г. в местности карбек-грестеин, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности фатоувилле-грестеин, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.9 June 1003–23 April 1050: 9 de junio de 1003–23 de abril de 1050
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Herleva de Falaise nació el 9 de junio de 1003, en Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Fulbert de Falaise, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Doda, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Herluin de Conteville aproximadamente 1029. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de abril de 1050, en Carbec-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Fatouville-Grestain, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
